summary: Rank the 56 PRD decisions by impact/criticality via a 5-perspective panel (architect/designer/build-lead/risk-QA/holistic), then synthesize one consensus priority order with tiers + dependencies

r.notes: See rankings/top5_ids. No repo files needed — ranking derived from the 56-decision battery in the prompt.

Lens: GAME DESIGNER — identity/vision and player-experience weighted highest, then blast-radius/reversibility/contradiction.

P0 (decide first — reshape the PRD's spine):
- Q1: THE foundational data-model decision. Level model drives hpMax, the +1-attr-per-2-levels build economy, the global skill-XP multiplier, AND it is the canonical place the locked labour→combat no-cross-feed invariant either holds or leaks. Blocks M2. Touches 7 findings. Sticky and load-bearing for everything below it. Highest.
- Q5: The emotional peak of T2 (Otsuru/Tama truth). Guaranteed-on-spine vs gated-behind-optional-Origin is mutually exclusive — a builder cannot implement both, and it decides whether the game's warmest payoff is for everyone or quietly missable by min-maxers. Pure experience-defining; this is what the game IS.
- Q6: "What is conditioning" is the same wall as Q1 from the other side — the contradiction (zero-bonus labour gate vs STR/AGI combat drill) would reopen the exact cross-feed the PRD claims to have killed (A3/D-011). Resolves a live identity contradiction; must settle with Q1.
- Q2: RNG sub-stream model + persisted shape. Determinism + save-format = the stickiest, most expensive-to-reverse layer; byte-identical replay and "saved fight resumes identically" rest on it, and it forward-stabilizes every future content add. Ranked P0 for reversibility/blast-radius despite being more engineering than experience.

P1 (high-impact, settle early): the economy spine and progression-gating shape — Q7 (resolves a logical impossibility in the T0 gate AND the three-pillar "win-it-your-own-way" identity), Q30 (rung-promotion gating mechanism — meter vs flag — sets the reducer contract), Q3/Q34 (store-vs-derive data-model and the must-persist sub-engine/CombatEncounterState blobs), Q13/Q14/Q29 (coin economy existence + net/gross accrual model + the T0-trade-vs-locked-T1 contradiction — structural, even though §4 numbers are provisional per D-021), the release-defining narrative beats Q25 (name reclamation = the title's theme) and Q24 (the T3 cliff-hanger that decides whether v1 lands), the longest-tier fun spine Q22 (T2 anti-slump + the combos-vs-no-leakage adjudication), Q4 (wire fun — the #1 bar — into the milestone plan), and Q15 (combat build diversity = how combat feels).

P2: real but contained — pacing/stamina specs (Q31/Q17/Q32/Q47), determinism-of-powers (Q36), save-write atomicity/storage posture (Q44/Q37/Q43), verifier hardening (Q28), single-pick scope calls (Q35 weather mechanical-vs-cosmetic, Q8 E2-vs-E3, Q16 retreat semantics), and the narrative-warmth nits (Q11 dead-vs-lost, Q26 Naoyuki beat, Q40 climax prose dedup).

P3: clear-default / small-blast or release-only (M7) — terminology/romanization, naming hygiene, accessibility-contrast tuning, migration/identity-field plumbing, licensing/credits/rating/fonts/audio, perf-budget, doc-drift guards. Real work, but none reshape what the game is and most have an obvious recommended default.

Provisional-numbers caveat applied (D-021): pure §4 tune-numbers were pushed down UNLESS they encode a structural contradiction or impossibility (Q7/Q14/Q29) or a system shape (Q31/Q47).

Method note: ranked from the supplied decision corpus; did not need to open the PRD since the prioritization is a relative-impact judgment over the provided question/context/recommendation/related-findings for each item.

Build-lead lens: blocking + dependency weighted highest; foundational data-model/determinism/save-format/progression-mechanism unblockers float to the top, §4 tune-numbers and M7 release/legal items sink.

TOP-5 (decide first): Q1 level/attribute data-model (gates M2, build economy, closes labour->combat backdoor); Q2 RNG sub-stream + persisted shape (determinism/replay spine, save format); Q3 stored-vs-derived persisted surface (save §6.4/§6.8 contract + registry §6.5); Q34 GameState/CombatEncounterState shape + id types (the concrete persisted structs everything serializes through); Q30 rung-promotion gating mechanism (M1 phase 4 is literally unwritable until this is picked). These three+ are bedrock: most other decisions assume a settled data model + determinism story.

P0 also includes Q6 (the conditioning definition is a contradiction in a LOCKED core invariant and the skill type-wall — tightly coupled to Q1; must be settled before any skill typing).

P1 = the economy-spine contradictions and determinism architecture that gate milestone validation: Q7 (logically-impossible R6/E2 gate + 3-pillar framing — deadlocks CI pacing), Q14 + Q29 (T0 accrual tie-out / net-vs-gross double-count / T0-trade-violates-locked-T1 — block the T0 pacing proof), Q36 (ban Math.pow / integer-power lint — sticky cross-machine determinism, touches all curve code), Q31 (soft-stamina spec + does it throttle combat — touches §4.6.1 and locked first-fight win-rate), Q44 (atomic autosave-write — informs the M0 save spine, architectural), Q10 (progression ladder reveal/gate — changes reducer contract + DEV-API), Q5 (is the Otsuru truth spine-guaranteed — emotional-heart contradiction; PARENT of the narrower Q25/Q40 naming-ownership calls, so rank it above them by dependency).

Dependency notes: Q25 and Q40 are narrower restatements of the same G6/name-on-spine ownership question as Q5 and even contradict each other in their recommendations — they should be resolved together AFTER Q5. Q47 (satietyMax) and Q17 (stamina floor const) are sub-numbers of Q31; Q35 (weather mechanical-vs-cosmetic) gates Q55 (where festival/weather data lives). Q37 and Q43 are near-duplicate storage-survival questions across rounds (R3/R4); Q44/Q45 are the write/migration cluster — all P2 save-robustness, important insurance but not start-blocking. Q13 (market/coin numbers) is economy but the recommendation itself defers it to M4 authoring.

Deliberately low (P3): pure §4 tune-numbers and cosmetic/UX/a11y-palette polish (Q20, Q21, Q48), narrative/cast hygiene (Q11, Q39, Q26, Q12, Q23), and the M7 release-only legal/asset/rating/credits/license/perf items (Q51, Q53, Q54, Q52, Q50, Q56, Q46) — these only bite at release and have clear defaults per ADR D-021 (freeze = locked intent, numbers provisional). Q27 (real-name leaks) scores below its R2 'high' severity because the offending characters are T4/post-v1 — it needs a human call but does not block the v1 build, and Q28's verifier real-name lint would catch it mechanically.

RISK/QA lens: contradictions, impossibilities, silent-failures, determinism-breaks and data-loss float to the top; pure §4 tune-numbers (provisional per ADR D-021) sink even at severity=high unless they encode a structural impossibility.

P0 (8): Q1 undefined level/attribute model = biggest cross-PRD blast, blocks M2, plus the labour-to-combat back door. Q2 RNG sub-stream canon (D-013a/H4 plural cursors) vs §6.7 single seed/counter = a determinism/save-format contradiction that breaks the byte-identical replay promise. Q3 persisted-surface contradiction (§6.4 "store only non-derivable" vs §2.19/§6.8): market-saturation has nowhere to live and the belief-beast registry guard is missing = data-model + silent failure. Q29/Q14 the T0 economic proof is arithmetically impossible (Estate gate reaches 728<800, throughput double-counted net-then-gross, held-koku trajectory modelled nowhere so an R6 soft-lock can't be ruled out, and the proof spends deed-ip on TRADE that is a LOCKED T1 reveal) = real deadlock. Q44 silent autosave WRITE failure (player believes saved, loses 28.5h) = purest silent data-loss and it informs the M0 save spine. Q6 "conditioning" ZERO-bonus vs grants-STR/AGI = a contradiction that reopens the locked invariant. Q30 rung-gating model is "currently unwritable," blocks M1.

De-duplication of clusters (ranked the live/deepest decision highest, dependents lower): T0-economy = Q29 > Q14 > Q7. Save robustness = Q44 (P0) > Q19/Q37/Q43 (P1, the itch.io Safari/IndexedDB partition wipe + accidental-import wipe) > Q45/Q46 (P2). G6 name/Otsuru-reveal payoff-ownership contradiction = Q5/Q25 (P1) and Q40 (P2, mostly restates + prose). Satiety/soft-stamina = Q31 (P1, §4.7.1-vs-§4.6.1 contradiction + M1 blocker) > Q17 (P2, reveal-ordering desync) > Q47 (P2, the satietyMax number). Determinism = Q2 (P0), Q36 (P1, Math.pow ULP cross-machine save-desync that is invisible in single-engine CI), Q35 (P2, weather draw has no persisted field = breaks resume). Q32 self-heal is logically broken (appraisal never fires below high-water) = a real impossibility in locked canon D-015. Q28 hardening the sole §6.6 verifier is the QA force-multiplier that catches these recurring classes.

De-prioritized to P3: legal/credits/licensing/rating/font that only bite at M7 release with clear defaults (Q51, Q53, Q54, Q50, Q52), cosmetic/measurement tuning (Q20 fun-proxy, Q21 palette, Q42 bulk-UI), narrative flavour with no build-blocking contradiction (Q11, Q12, Q26, Q39, Q41), and perf build-to-learn (Q56). Authenticity real-name leaks (Q27, Q9, Q39) are human-locked-canon breaches but reversibility is cheap (clerical rename) and they bite at release, so mid/low.

Caveat: scores derived from the provided decision dossiers (each carries its own contradiction/impossibility context), not from re-reading the PRD; where two ids name the same underlying risk (Q37=Q43 itch storage; Q5/Q25/Q40 G6 name) I scored them close but distinct so the human still sees both action items.

Lens: holistic, all 5 rubric dims weighted evenly (blast radius, reversibility cost, criticality/contradiction, identity/vision, dependency).

P0 (decide-first, foundational): Q1 (level model + attribute system + closing the labour->combat back door — drives hpMax, build economy, combat XP, a global multiplier; blocks M2; protects the core no-cross-feed invariant; max blast/dependency). Q2 (RNG sub-stream + persisted shape — the byte-identical replay/save-format promise rests on it; architecture, irreversible). Q3 (persisted surface vs derived: decides the stored data-model surface and save format). Q6 (definition of 'conditioning' — a type-system contradiction that, if mis-typed, REOPENS the very labour->combat invariant Q1 protects; tightly dependent on Q1). Q34 (save data-model gaps: subEngines store for the ≤1/3 clamp invariant + the must-persist CombatEncounterState blob + id types — save format is the stickiest reversibility cost). These five are the data-model / determinism / core-invariant spine; everything downstream binds to them.

P1 (high-impact, mostly structural or contradiction-resolving): progression-gating mechanism (Q30), the impossible T0 gate / pillar-count framing (Q7), the guaranteed-vs-missable emotional climax (Q5), cross-machine determinism policy / Math.pow ban (Q36), and the economy-spine net/gross + T0 accrual proofs (Q14, Q29) — these encode STRUCTURAL choices (not pure tune numbers, so elevated past P3 despite D-021), plus coin-spendability/sink economy shape (Q13), weapon-line/stance build identity + data placement (Q15), and write-atomicity informing the M0 save spine (Q44).

P2 (medium): localized contradictions, scope picks, and save/UX hardening that matter but don't reshape the PRD — combat/retreat/difficulty (Q16), the rest of the G6 climax cluster (Q24/Q25/Q40), anti-slump authoring (Q22), self-heal dent law (Q32), durability (Q33), weather mechanical-vs-cosmetic (Q35), the storage-survival/migration save cluster (Q37/Q43/Q45), satietyMax stub (Q47), verifier hardening (Q28), registry home for festivals (Q55), authenticity real-name leaks on late-tier characters (Q27).

P3 (tune-later / cosmetic / release-only with clear defaults + small blast): per D-021 most §4 tune numbers, naming/terminology hygiene (Q9/Q12/Q39/Q41), UI palette/cadence polish (Q20/Q21/Q42/Q48/Q49), perf-defer (Q56), and the entire M7 legal/font/credits/rating/license bundle (Q51/Q52/Q53/Q54) that only bites at release.

Notable clusters the human can batch: G6 climax (Q5>Q25>Q40); T0 economy proof (Q7/Q14/Q29); save durability/atomicity (Q44>Q3/Q34 foundation, then Q37/Q43/Q45/Q46/Q19); soft-stamina (Q17/Q31/Q47); world-sim weather/festivals (Q35/Q55); release-legal (Q50/Q51/Q52/Q53/Q54). Q37 and Q43 are near-duplicate storage-posture items (R3/R4) and should be answered together.

synthesis.rubric_note: Ranked by mean of 5 lenses (architect, designer, buildlead, riskqa, holistic), then dependency-corrected so any prerequisite outranks its dependents. Foundational data-model / determinism / save-format / core-invariant / progression-mechanism items float to P0; structural contradictions and economy-spine proofs to P1; localized contradictions, scope picks and save/UX hardening to P2; per ADR D-021, pure §4 tune-numbers and M7 release/legal/cosmetic items with clear defaults sink to P3 even at high severity.

ranked.unblocks: Combat math, the +1-attr/2-levels build economy, hpMax, the global skill-XP multiplier, conditioning typing (Q6), and all combat content (Q15/Q16); blocks M2.
ranked.why: The single foundational data-model decision (level model + attributes) and the canonical place the locked labour->combat no-cross-feed invariant holds or leaks — max blast radius, every ranker's #1.

ranked.unblocks: Save format, byte-identical replay, mid-fight combat RNG, and forward-stable content additions.
ranked.why: RNG sub-stream model + persisted shape is the determinism/save-format spine the whole replay/resume promise rests on — the stickiest, most expensive layer to reverse.

ranked.unblocks: The §6.4/§6.8 save contract, registry §6.5 belief-beast guard, market-saturation/weather storage (Q13/Q35), and Q34.
ranked.why: Resolves the store-vs-derive persisted-surface contradiction (market saturation has nowhere to live; the type-guard registry is missing) — defines the stored data-model everything serializes through.

ranked.unblocks: The skill type-wall and combat-stat typing; prevents re-opening the labour->combat cross-feed.
ranked.why: 'Conditioning' as a zero-bonus gate vs a STR/AGI drill is a live contradiction in a LOCKED core invariant (A3/D-011) — mis-typed it reopens exactly what Q1 protects, so it must settle alongside Q1.

ranked.unblocks: Progression accrual law, the reducer contract, M1 phase 4 validation, and the ladder reveal/gate spec (Q10).
ranked.why: The rung-promotion gating mechanism (numeric meter vs flag/event) is currently unwritable and blocks M1; it sets the reducer contract many systems bind to.

ranked.unblocks: The ≤1/3-clamp tests, save/load, and combat-state persistence.
ranked.why: Persisted data-model gaps — subEngines store for the hardest invariant, the must-persist CombatEncounterState blob, undeclared id types — the stickiest save-format surface; foundational despite a medium-agreement spread (67-86).

ranked.unblocks: The T0 pacing proof, the economy tie-out (Q14/Q29), and the Q28 gate-monotonicity check.
ranked.why: Fixes a logically-impossible T0 Estate gate (unbuildable/unleaveable) plus the three-pillar framing — a structural impossibility that deadlocks a CI pacing run and touches the 'win your own way' identity.

ranked.unblocks: T0 affordability and the R6 soft-lock proof on the gating E2 build.
ranked.why: The T0 accrual ledger doesn't tie out (missing ~16-18K sinks, net-then-gross double-count, unreachable Arms floor) — a structural economy proof, not a retunable number.

ranked.unblocks: The G6/name-ownership cluster (Q25, Q40) and §3.6/M6 implementation.
ranked.why: Decides whether T2's emotional peak (Otsuru/Tama truth) is spine-guaranteed or missable behind optional Origin — mutually exclusive build paths defining a core experience; LOW agreement (65-87), flag for human.

ranked.unblocks: A sound T0 economic proof and verified E2@R6 affordability.
ranked.why: The centrepiece T0 proof is arithmetically broken (gate reaches 728<800; spends deed-ip on TRADE that is a LOCKED T1 reveal) — a real deadlock, sibling to Q14.

ranked.unblocks: Cross-machine byte-identical replay and all r^n curve code.
ranked.why: Determinism policy (ban Math.pow / mandate integer-power, extend §6.1 lint) closes a cross-engine ULP save-desync hole invisible in single-engine CI — sticky, touches every growth curve.

ranked.unblocks: The M0 save-spine atomicity guarantee and the migration/identity cluster (Q45/Q46).
ranked.why: Silent autosave WRITE failure is the purest data-loss case (player believes saved, loses 28.5h) and informs the M0 save spine — architectural, not cosmetic.

ranked.unblocks: The headline T1 market reveal and a balanceable coin economy.
ranked.why: Coin is gathered but unspendable in the numbers; without an exchange rate, one sink, and MarketState the T1 'coin row lit' reveal cannot be built — a structural economy gap (recommendation itself defers detail to M4).

ranked.unblocks: The v1 ending and the stale §5 T3-header rewrite.
ranked.why: The T3 cliff-hanger stub (castle-town vs porter-guild) is the release's load-bearing 'to be continued'; a stale header would ship a stub re-running already-played content. LOW agreement (50-76), flag.

ranked.unblocks: The stamina floor (Q17), satietyMax (Q47), and M1 phases 2-3 throttle.
ranked.why: Soft-stamina/satiety spec + whether it throttles combat — §4.7.1 multiplies by an undefined term and §4.6.1 disagrees; a system-shape choice (not a tune number) that M1 must implement.

ranked.unblocks: Automated regression on the only release gate, catching the recurring impossible-gate / accrual / real-name failure classes.
ranked.why: Hardening the sole §6.6 verifier is a QA force-multiplier, but it can only assert invariants once the upstream shapes (gates, accrual, name list) are settled.

ranked.unblocks: Milestone-level fun gating and phase ownership for fishing and the Name bar.
ranked.why: Wires FUN (the #1 stated quality bar) into §7 with a slog-risk row + fun-proxy tasks and assigns unowned locked systems — high identity weight but no hard build dependency.

ranked.unblocks: Nav reveal ladder, reducer contract, and the DEV-API surface.
ranked.why: Progression-ladder reveal/gate clarity (nested panels vs nav nodes; RANK-threshold wording) follows from the Q30 gating mechanism and touches the reducer/DEV-API contract.

ranked.unblocks: Combat build diversity and the EquipDef archetype shape.
ranked.why: Which 2-3 weapon lines ship and their mechanical identity — combat math currently treats every weapon identically; depends on the Q1 combat/level model.

ranked.unblocks: G6 implementation and the name-on-spine vs Origin-track ownership.
ranked.why: Whether a skip-Origin player reclaims the name 'Tahei' at G6 is the thematic core of the title, but it is a narrower restatement of Q5 and must resolve after it; LARGEST spread (30-77), flag.

ranked.unblocks: Save durability posture and the M7 WebKit/Safari browser matrix.
ranked.why: itch.io's partitioned/blocked third-party IndexedDB can silently wipe a 28.5h save — a launch defect class; near-duplicate of Q43, answer together.

ranked.unblocks: Retreat semantics and difficulty win-rate calibration at later rungs.
ranked.why: Retreat is a first-class verb with undefined mechanics; mis-routing it as a dented loss breaks the soft-setback/escape-valve intent — localized but contradiction-adjacent.

ranked.unblocks: The Q55 data home and the world-sim pillar scope; a persisted weather field for resume.
ranked.why: Weather/festivals mechanical vs cosmetic-only decides whether §4 owes magnitudes and whether the per-day weather draw needs a persisted field (byte-identical resume).

ranked.unblocks: The dent recovery path and the 'self-heals, never a wipe' guarantee (D-015).
ranked.why: Dent self-heal is logically broken — the appraisal only increments above high-water, so a dented pillar never heals without re-grinding — a real impossibility in locked canon.

ranked.unblocks: The T2 anti-slump fun spine and the §4.3 no-leakage exception ruling.
ranked.why: Authors the seasonal-reward-rotation half of the T2 package and adjudicates cross-pillar combos vs the no-leakage invariant — the longest tier's named biggest fun risk; spread 46-71, flag.

ranked.unblocks: The STAMINA_RATE_FLOOR constant and a deterministic one-per-beat reveal queue.
ranked.why: Sub-number of Q31 — without a non-zero floor a naive satiety impl hits the forbidden zero, and simultaneous reveals can desync; settle after the Q31 system shape.

ranked.unblocks: M7 verify-gate acceptance criteria for storage durability.
ranked.why: Near-duplicate of Q37 across rounds (R3/R4) — same itch-iframe storage-survival question framed as an M7 gate; should be answered in one decision.

ranked.unblocks: M2b durability wear inside the deterministic combat fold.
ranked.why: No wear/break rule exists though durability is stored; an ad-hoc rule would be determinism-affecting, so it must respect the Q2 determinism policy.

ranked.unblocks: Mobile primary/overflow nav and accidental-wipe insurance (confirm + pre-overwrite snapshot).
ranked.why: Mobile IA + save-safety on an unrecoverable single slot — cheap, high-payoff hardening; riskqa rates it notably higher (66) than the others.

ranked.unblocks: Safe schema migration with rollback and a post-chain version assertion.
ranked.why: Migration/pre-migration-backup lifecycle is undefined; it builds on the Q44 write-atomicity decision and the Q3/Q34 save shape.

ranked.unblocks: §3 climax prose dedup and consistent naming ownership.
ranked.why: G6/O5 share four near-verbatim sentences and the naming clause contradicts §3.6.2 — mostly restates the Q5/Q25 ownership call plus trivial tone fixes, so it trails them.

ranked.unblocks: Estate scope clarity and §3.6/§5 T2 prose.
ranked.why: Cap v1 at E2 vs author an E3 stage — scope-clarity pick following the only authored cost table; clear recommended default, small blast.

ranked.unblocks: The M1 satiety bar render, throttle fraction, and test.
ranked.why: satietyMax has no formula — a true M1 blocker, but a flat stub is the obvious default and it is downstream of the Q31 satiety system shape.

ranked.unblocks: A6 authenticity compliance and the Q28 real-name lint list.
ranked.why: Real-name leaks on apex T4 characters breach human-locked canon and need an intent (homage vs leak) call, but the fix is clerical and bites at release, not the v1 build.

ranked.unblocks: M4 world-sim content authoring and verifier id cross-checks.
ranked.why: Registry home for SeasonRules/Festival/WeatherHazard — only needed (and only shaped) once Q35 decides weather/festivals are mechanical.

ranked.unblocks: Accessibility acceptance (live-region scoping, textScale reflow, SR pass).
ranked.why: A11y is locked canon but these are mostly low-cost correctness items with clear recommended defaults and no build-blocking contradiction.

ranked.unblocks: Visual-consistency posture (SVG for load-bearing motifs) and audio legal provenance.
ranked.why: Emoji render per-OS and could undercut the woodblock pillar; meaning is carried by kanji so no functional break — aesthetic + legal, clear default.

ranked.unblocks: Consistent T2 warmest-payoff framing (dead vs lost, weir vs boundary-stone).
ranked.why: Narrative canon loose ends are warmth-affecting but have clear recommended defaults and small blast; designer rates it far higher (54) than buildlead (24), flag.

ranked.unblocks: Naoyuki rival->ally arc continuity in the v1 middle tier.
ranked.why: One interstitial beat protects a locked arc for minimal content, but it is optional polish with no contradiction; spread 28-52, flag.

ranked.unblocks: Import safety (magic field fast-reject, referential-integrity pass).
ranked.why: Mainly bites hand-edited/foreign imports; cheap insurance downstream of the Q44 save path, low blast.

ranked.unblocks: Terminology/romanization consistency (Standing overload, gōshi/ronin lint).
ranked.why: Clear cheapest-disambiguation defaults and a small blast radius; v1 terms are already glossed, glossary defers to T3/T4.

ranked.unblocks: Functional-text contrast compliance (move hints to --ink-soft).
ranked.why: Contained palette correctness fix in ui-design.md; clear default, does not block M0/M1.

ranked.unblocks: A compliant first itch.io zip (self-hosted OFL fonts).
ranked.why: M7-only licensing/delivery with a clear recommended default (Option B); only bites at release.

ranked.unblocks: The broker bulk-sale balance invariant (progressive per-unit walk-down).
ranked.why: The damper bulk-application rule is a small balance invariant; bulk UI is an implementation nicety with native itch devlogs as the changelog backstop.

ranked.unblocks: The destructive-action confirm/undo policy in §2.19/§6.11.
ranked.why: Guard only rare unrecoverable actions — clear recommended default, keeps the fast loop frictionless, low blast.

ranked.unblocks: Audio legal/bundle posture and the §7.4.1 R4 correction.
ranked.why: M7-only audio scope; synthesized Web Audio kills licensing/bundle exposure — clear default, release-gated.

ranked.unblocks: T2 quest-scoping clarity ('4 repeatable' vs bespoke one-shots).
ranked.why: A literal wording contradiction with a clear reword; no mechanical reshape.

ranked.unblocks: Pillar-panel visual/rate-demo correctness in ui-design.md.
ranked.why: Cosmetic palette/rate fixes (PRD is correct); designer rates higher (44) but it is doc-side polish, small blast.

ranked.unblocks: Accurate T2 fun measurement (tier-relative deed cadence).
ranked.why: A fun-doc proxy tweak with a clear recommended default; a literal reading false-fails T2 but the fix is contained to fun-factor.md.

ranked.unblocks: Doc-drift guards (Name band-top, path tags, derived-value tags).
ranked.why: Latent single-source-of-truth traps with no live drift today; lightweight now, verifier assertion when balance.ts lands.

ranked.unblocks: A later R7 perf/memory risk row once profiling gives real numbers.
ranked.why: Build-to-learn — big risks are already design-mitigated; inventing a budget before there is code to measure is premature.

ranked.unblocks: The About/Credits surface (build stamp + attributions) and inspiration-repo license attestation.
ranked.why: M7-ish, small scope, clear default; resolves a half-referenced surface but reshapes nothing.

ranked.unblocks: Clean §6.6 ZERO-gift invariant phrasing and allow-list adds.
ranked.why: Contained flavour/scope nits with clear rescopes; low blast.

ranked.unblocks: Cast disambiguation (rename non-locked Naozane/Obaa Sato, re-glyph AGI).
ranked.why: Taste calls only the human arbitrates; most names are LOCKED and renames reopen locked decisions for little gain.

ranked.unblocks: Public-release legality (LICENSE file before M7).
ranked.why: Legal, M7-only, with a clear common default (permissive code + proprietary/CC content); clerical once decided.

ranked.unblocks: itch upload metadata (content rating/warning descriptors).
ranked.why: Near-zero-cost release-checklist step with the lowest consensus impact of all 56.

synthesis.dependency_notes: Key decide-X-before-Y chains (dependency order overrode raw mean where noted): (1) Q1 -> Q6 (conditioning typing), Q15/Q16 (combat content), Q31 (satiety touches level/hpMax) — Q1 is the parent of the whole combat/attribute spine. (2) Q2 -> Q34, Q36, Q33 — determinism/RNG before any save-format or curve/wear code. (3) Q2+Q3 -> Q34 -> Q44 -> Q45/Q46 — the save spine: shape, then write-atomicity, then migration/identity. (4) Q7 -> Q14 and Q29 — the impossible-gate fix must precede the accrual tie-outs that re-itemize against it; cluster these three. (5) Q5 -> Q25 -> Q40 — the G6 climax/name-ownership cluster: settle the spine-guaranteed question first; Q25 (name reclaim) and Q40 (prose dedup) restate it and one even contradicts the other, so resolve as one batch. (6) Q31 -> Q17 and Q47 — soft-stamina system shape before its floor constant and satietyMax stub. (7) Q35 -> Q55 — weather mechanical/cosmetic before its registry home. (8) Q30 -> Q10 — gating mechanism before the ladder reveal/gate wording. (9) Q3 -> Q13 (market storage) and Q35 (weather field). (10) Q7+Q14+Q27 -> Q28 — the verifier can only assert gate-monotonicity/accrual/real-name invariants once those upstream shapes are fixed. Near-duplicates to merge into single decisions: Q37=Q43 (itch storage posture, R3/R4) and Q5/Q25/Q40 (G6 name). Low-agreement items flagged for human judgement (rankers diverged sharply): Q25 (30-77), Q5 (65-87), Q24 (50-76), Q22 (46-71), Q11 (24-54), Q26 (28-52), Q20/Q21 (cosmetic split).
